scored_controls.name: SMBv1 Protocol
scored_controls.description: Legacy file-sharing protocol with known exploits (EternalBlue/WannaCry)

scored_controls.name: LLMNR (Link-Local Multicast Name Resolution)
scored_controls.description: Legacy name resolution protocol vulnerable to poisoning attacks

scored_controls.name: NetBIOS over TCP/IP
scored_controls.description: Legacy name resolution vulnerable to poisoning and enumeration attacks

scored_controls.name: BitLocker Full-Disk Encryption
scored_controls.description: Full-disk encryption protecting data at rest -- required for HIPAA ePHI

scored_controls.name: Windows Defender / Antivirus
scored_controls.description: Endpoint antivirus, real-time protection, and definition currency

scored_controls.name: Password Policy
scored_controls.description: Minimum length, complexity, and expiry enforcement (CIS: 12+ chars)

scored_controls.name: Windows Updates
scored_controls.description: OS patch currency and security update compliance

scored_controls.name: Local Administrator Accounts
scored_controls.description: Privileged local accounts and least-privilege enforcement

scored_controls.name: Windows Audit Policy & Log Retention
scored_controls.description: Event log policy coverage -- logon, object access, policy changes

scored_controls.name: Windows Firewall
scored_controls.description: Host-based firewall profiles and inbound rule configuration

scored_controls.name: Account Lockout Policy
scored_controls.description: Lockout threshold and duration after failed logon attempts

scored_controls.name: Guest Account
scored_controls.description: Built-in Guest account must be disabled

scored_controls.name: Screen Lock and Auto-Logoff
scored_controls.description: Inactivity timeout --15 min with password-on-resume (HIPAA: required)

scored_controls.name: User Account Control (UAC)
scored_controls.description: UAC enabled with Admin Approval Mode for built-in Administrator

scored_controls.name: RDP (Remote Desktop Protocol)
scored_controls.description: RDP disabled or NLA enforced -- open RDP is a primary ransomware vector

scored_controls.name: SMB Signing
scored_controls.description: SMB packet signing prevents man-in-the-middle relay attacks

scored_controls.name: NTLMv2 Authentication Level
scored_controls.description: LM and NTLMv1 disabled -- only NTLMv2 or Kerberos allowed

scored_controls.name: Autorun / AutoPlay
scored_controls.description: USB and removable media auto-execution disabled (malware vector)

scored_controls.name: PowerShell Execution Policy
scored_controls.description: Restricts unsigned script execution to prevent malware

scored_controls.name: Event Log Size and Retention
scored_controls.description: Security log --192MB -- insufficient size causes evidence loss

scored_controls.name: Windows Defender Event Logging
scored_controls.description: Defender threat and detection events visible in Event Log

scored_controls.name: Windows Firewall Logging
scored_controls.description: Dropped packet and connection logging enabled for forensics

scored_controls.name: Secure Boot (UEFI)
scored_controls.description: UEFI Secure Boot prevents unauthorized bootloader/rootkit execution

scored_controls.name: Anonymous Access & Null Sessions
scored_controls.description: Prevents unauthenticated enumeration of users, shares, and SAM

scored_controls.name: Open Ports -- Unexpected Listening Services
scored_controls.description: Services listening on non-standard ports indicate attack surface expansion

scored_controls.name: Cleartext Protocols (FTP/Telnet)
scored_controls.description: FTP port 21 and Telnet port 23 transmit credentials in plaintext

scored_controls.name: WinRM Remote Management
scored_controls.description: WinRM without HTTPS allows credential interception on the network

scored_controls.name: IPv6 Configuration
scored_controls.description: Unconfigured IPv6 enables rogue DHCPv6 and SLAAC attacks

scored_controls.name: Network Discovery
scored_controls.description: Enabled network discovery broadcasts host presence to the entire network

scored_controls.name: Print Spooler (PrintNightmare)
scored_controls.description: Running Print Spooler enables PrintNightmare RCE -- CVE-2021-34527

scored_controls.name: WPAD / Proxy Configuration
scored_controls.description: WPAD auto-discovery enables man-in-the-middle proxy attacks

scored_controls.name: Weak TLS/SSL Protocols (Schannel)
scored_controls.description: SSL 3.0 and TLS 1.0/1.1 have known vulnerabilities (POODLE, BEAST)

scored_controls.name: Stale Local User Accounts
scored_controls.description: Enabled accounts inactive for 90+ days are orphaned access vectors

scored_controls.name: Accounts with Password Never Expires
scored_controls.description: Non-expiring passwords violate HIPAA and CIS rotation requirements

scored_controls.name: Built-in Administrator Account Rename
scored_controls.description: Default "Administrator" name is a known brute-force target

scored_controls.name: Concurrent Logged-On Users
scored_controls.description: Multiple concurrent sessions may indicate shared credentials or unauthorized access

scored_controls.name: VSS Shadow Copies
scored_controls.description: Shadow copies are the first line of ransomware recovery

scored_controls.name: Volume Shadow Copy Service
scored_controls.description: VSS service must be enabled for shadow copies and backup tools to function

scored_controls.name: Windows Backup Configuration
scored_controls.description: No backup means no recovery -- HIPAA requires documented contingency plan

scored_controls.name: Windows Recovery Environment (WinRE)
scored_controls.description: WinRE enables system recovery without external media

scored_controls.name: Certificate Store Management
scored_controls.description: Expired or weak certificates create trust and security vulnerabilities

scored_controls.name: Weak Cryptographic Protocols
scored_controls.description: SSL 2.0/3.0 and weak TLS versions must be disabled

scored_controls.name: SSL Certificate Validation
scored_controls.description: Self-signed or weak SSL certificates compromise secure communications

scored_controls.name: Unsigned Software Detection
scored_controls.description: Unsigned executables may indicate malware or unauthorized software

scored_controls.name: Outdated Software Detection
scored_controls.description: Outdated software contains known vulnerabilities

scored_controls.name: Suspicious Process Detection
scored_controls.description: Unusual processes may indicate malware or unauthorized software

scored_controls.name: Shared Folder Security
scored_controls.description: Overly permissive shares create data exposure risks

scored_controls.name: NTFS Permission Security
scored_controls.description: Weak NTFS permissions on system directories create privilege escalation risks

scored_controls.name: Browser Security Configuration
scored_controls.description: Insecure browser settings enable malware delivery and data theft

scored_controls.name: Application Execution Controls
scored_controls.description: Unrestricted application execution enables malware persistence and privilege escalation

scored_controls.name: Software Inventory
scored_controls.description: Complete list of installed software for asset management and compliance

scored_controls.name: WDigest Authentication
scored_controls.description: Ensures WDigest plaintext credential storage is disabled

scored_controls.name: Credential Guard
scored_controls.description: Validates Virtualization-Based Security and Credential Guard are running

scored_controls.name: LSASS Protection
scored_controls.description: Ensures LSASS runs as Protected Process Light to prevent credential dumping

scored_controls.name: DEP Policy
scored_controls.description: Validates Data Execution Prevention is configured for maximum protection

scored_controls.name: SEHOP Protection
scored_controls.description: Ensures Structured Exception Handler Overwrite Protection is enabled

scored_controls.name: ASLR Policy
scored_controls.description: Validates Address Space Layout Randomization is enabled system-wide

scored_controls.name: ASR Rules
scored_controls.description: Validates critical Attack Surface Reduction rules are configured in Block mode

scored_controls.name: PowerShell Script Block Logging
scored_controls.description: Ensures PowerShell script block logging is enabled for threat visibility

scored_controls.name: PowerShell Module Logging
scored_controls.description: Ensures PowerShell module logging is enabled for audit trail

scored_controls.name: PowerShell Transcription
scored_controls.description: Ensures PowerShell transcription is enabled for session recording

scored_controls.name: Advanced Audit Policy
scored_controls.description: Validates critical audit subcategories are configured for security monitoring

scored_controls.name: Command Line Process Auditing
scored_controls.description: Ensures command-line arguments are included in process creation events

scored_controls.name: User Rights Assignment
scored_controls.description: Validates critical user rights are properly restricted

scored_controls.name: LDAP Client Signing
scored_controls.description: Ensures LDAP client signing is enabled to prevent relay attacks

scored_controls.name: LAN Manager Authentication Level
scored_controls.description: Ensures NTLMv2 is enforced and legacy LM/NTLM protocols are refused

scored_controls.name: Remote Assistance
scored_controls.description: Ensures Remote Assistance solicited offers are disabled

scored_controls.name: Autoplay Disabled
scored_controls.description: Ensures AutoRun is disabled for all drive types to prevent malware execution

scored_controls.name: Interactive Logon Message
scored_controls.description: Ensures a legal notice is displayed before logon for compliance and deterrence

scored_controls.name: Cached Logons Count
scored_controls.description: Ensures the number of cached logon credentials is limited to reduce theft risk

scored_controls.name: DNS Client Multicast
scored_controls.description: Ensures multicast name resolution (LLMNR) is disabled to prevent poisoning attacks

scored_controls.name: Wi-Fi Security
scored_controls.description: Ensures automatic connection to open Wi-Fi hotspots and Wi-Fi Sense are disabled

scored_controls.name: Remote Registry Service
scored_controls.description: Ensures the Remote Registry service is disabled to prevent remote registry access

scored_controls.name: Unnecessary Services
scored_controls.description: Ensures non-essential services (Xbox, SSDP, UPnP, Telnet, SNMP) are disabled

scored_controls.name: SSH Configuration
scored_controls.description: Validates OpenSSH Server is either not installed or securely configured

scored_controls.name: RDP Session Timeout
scored_controls.description: Ensures idle and disconnected RDP sessions are configured with timeout limits

scored_controls.name: Machine Inactivity Limit
scored_controls.description: Ensures the machine locks after a defined period of inactivity

scored_controls.name: SmartScreen Status
scored_controls.description: Ensures Windows SmartScreen is enabled to protect against malicious downloads and sites

scored_controls.name: AppLocker or WDAC
scored_controls.description: Validates that application whitelisting is configured via AppLocker or Windows Defender Application Control

scored_controls.name: Telemetry Level
scored_controls.description: Ensures Windows telemetry is set to Security or Required (Basic) to minimize data collection

scored_controls.name: Cortana and Search
scored_controls.description: Ensures Cortana is disabled and web search is turned off to prevent data leakage

scored_controls.name: Removable Storage Control
scored_controls.description: Validates that removable storage devices are restricted to prevent data exfiltration

scored_controls.name: Insecure File Associations
scored_controls.description: Ensures Windows Script Host is disabled and dangerous script file extensions are neutralized

scored_controls.name: Encryption at Rest
scored_controls.description: Verifies BitLocker uses AES-256 encryption with TPM key protector on the system drive

scored_controls.name: TLS Cipher Suites
scored_controls.description: Ensures no weak or deprecated TLS cipher suites are enabled (RC4, DES, 3DES, NULL, EXPORT, MD5)

scored_controls.name: EFS Status
scored_controls.description: Checks whether EFS is available and whether a Data Recovery Agent certificate is configured

scored_controls.name: Access Control Lists
scored_controls.description: Verifies that critical system directories do not grant excessive permissions to Everyone or Users

scored_controls.name: Anonymous Enumeration
scored_controls.description: Ensures RestrictAnonymousSAM and RestrictAnonymous are set to prevent anonymous account/share enumeration

scored_controls.name: Null Session Pipes
scored_controls.description: Ensures NullSessionPipes and NullSessionShares are empty to prevent anonymous access to named pipes and shares

scored_controls.name: LSA Anonymous Name Lookup
scored_controls.description: Ensures the LSAAnonymousNameLookup security policy is disabled to prevent anonymous SID-to-name translation

scored_controls.name: Scheduled Tasks Audit
scored_controls.description: Detects suspicious scheduled tasks that may indicate persistence mechanisms

scored_controls.name: Startup Program Audit
scored_controls.description: Checks auto-start registry locations and startup folders for suspicious entries

scored_controls.name: WMI Subscriptions
scored_controls.description: Detects permanent WMI event subscriptions commonly used for malware persistence

scored_controls.name: Suspicious Registry Keys
scored_controls.description: Checks known registry hijack locations (IFEO, Winlogon, LSA) for tampering

scored_controls.name: Local Group Membership
scored_controls.description: Audits sensitive local groups (RDP Users, Backup Operators, Power Users) for unexpected members

scored_controls.name: Emergency Access Procedures
scored_controls.description: Verifies a break-glass local admin account exists for emergency access (HIPAA-relevant)

scored_controls.name: NTP Configuration
scored_controls.description: Verifies Windows Time service is running and synced to a valid NTP source

scored_controls.name: System Restore Config
scored_controls.description: Verifies system restore points exist and are recent for recovery readiness

scored_controls.name: Windows Integrity Check
scored_controls.description: Checks CBS log for system file corruption indicators and pending repairs

scored_controls.name: Driver Signing Enforcement
scored_controls.description: Verifies test signing and integrity check bypasses are not enabled in BCD

scored_controls.name: UEFI Secure Boot Enhanced
scored_controls.description: Verifies the system uses UEFI firmware with Secure Boot enabled

scored_controls.name: IPSEC Exemptions
scored_controls.description: Verifies IPSec NoDefaultExempt is configured to minimize protocol exemptions

scored_controls.name: DNS Over HTTPS
scored_controls.description: Checks whether DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH) is configured for encrypted DNS resolution

scored_controls.name: Multi-Factor Authentication Status
scored_controls.description: Verifies Windows Hello, smartcard, or FIDO2 MFA enrollment on the endpoint

scored_controls.name: Defender Signature Age
scored_controls.description: Checks antivirus definition currency â€” stale signatures miss new threats

scored_controls.name: SIEM / Log Forwarding
scored_controls.description: Verifies centralized log collection via WEF or SIEM agent

scored_controls.name: Hardware Asset Inventory
scored_controls.description: Collects hardware details for asset management and compliance tracking

scored_controls.name: Vulnerability Scan Agent
scored_controls.description: Verifies a vulnerability scanning agent is installed and running

scored_controls.name: Capacity Monitoring
scored_controls.description: Reports disk and memory utilization for capacity planning

scored_controls.name: Secure Delete Capability
scored_controls.description: Checks availability of secure file erasure tools for data sanitization

scored_controls.name: Web Filtering / Proxy
scored_controls.description: Checks for active web content filtering via proxy or DNS-based filtering

scored_controls.name: VPN Configuration
scored_controls.description: Checks for VPN client installation and configured connections

scored_controls.name: Cloud Sync Audit
scored_controls.description: Audits active cloud sync agents and management policy enforcement

scored_controls.name: PII Data Discovery
scored_controls.description: Scans user directories for files with names suggesting personally identifiable information

scored_controls.name: Patch Age Tracking
scored_controls.description: Evaluates days since last Windows hotfix installation to detect stale patching

scored_controls.name: File Integrity Monitoring (FIM)
scored_controls.description: Detects presence of file integrity monitoring agents (Sysmon, Wazuh, OSSEC, AppLocker audit)

scored_controls.name: Data Retention Age
scored_controls.description: Identifies stale files in temp and downloads directories indicating poor data retention practices

scored_controls.name: Baseline Drift Detection
scored_controls.description: Validates presence of configuration management or baseline tracking to detect unauthorized changes

scored_controls.name: Failed Logon Analysis
scored_controls.description: Analyzes Security event log for excessive failed logon attempts indicating brute force activity

scored_controls.name: Firewall Rule Quality
scored_controls.description: Identifies overly permissive inbound firewall rules allowing any port from any address

scored_controls.name: Backup Restore Readiness
scored_controls.description: Validates recent backup existence via VSS shadow copies and third-party backup agents

scored_controls.name: Log Retention Period
scored_controls.description: Validates event log retention mode and size meet compliance requirements for forensic readiness

scored_controls.name: USB Write Restriction
scored_controls.description: Validates that write access to removable USB storage is blocked via Group Policy or registry

scored_controls.name: Lock Screen Personalization Policies (001-002)
scored_controls.description: Ensures lock screen camera and slideshow are disabled via Group Policy.

scored_controls.name: Local Administrator Password Solution / LAPS (003, 057-059)
scored_controls.description: Verifies LAPS (legacy and Windows LAPS) is enabled and configured.
scored_controls.remediation: Enable Windows LAPS via Intune or GPO. Set BackupDirectory, ADPasswordEncryptionEnabled, and ADBackupDSRMPassword as appropriate.

scored_controls.name: MS Security Guide Settings (004-012)
scored_controls.description: Checks MS Security Guide registry settings including SMBv1, LSA protection, WDigest, and SEHOP.
scored_controls.remediation: Apply MS Security Guide GPO templates or manually set registry values. Key items: disable SMBv1, enable RunAsPPL, disable WDigest.

scored_controls.name: MSS Legacy Network Settings (013-018)
scored_controls.description: Checks MSS (Microsoft Solutions for Security) legacy TCP/IP hardening settings.
scored_controls.remediation: Apply MSS Legacy GPO settings or set registry values manually. Disable IP source routing for IPv4/IPv6, disable ICMP redirect, prevent NetBIOS name release on demand.

scored_controls.name: Network Hardening Policies (019-037)
scored_controls.description: Checks SMB signing/encryption audit, LLMNR, NetBIOS, mailslots, WLAN auto-connect, and hardened UNC paths.
scored_controls.remediation: Apply CIS network policy GPO settings. Key items: disable LLMNR/NetBIOS, enable SMB audit settings, configure hardened UNC paths, disable mailslots.

scored_controls.name: Printer Hardening Policies (038-044)
scored_controls.description: Checks printer RPC hardening, redirection guard, Point and Print restrictions, and copy files policy.
scored_controls.remediation: Apply printer hardening GPO settings. Enable RpcAuthnLevelPrivacyEnabled, RedirectionGuardPolicy, restrict Point and Print to admins, and set CopyFilesPolicy=1.

scored_controls.name: System Security Policies (045-056)
scored_controls.description: Checks VBS, ELAM, CredSSP, LSA PPL with UEFI lock, DMA protection, command-line auditing, and related system hardening settings.
scored_controls.remediation: Enable VBS via DeviceGuard GPO, set RunAsPPL=2 for UEFI-locked LSA protection, enable process creation auditing, enforce CredSSP oracle remediation, and configure DMA protection policy.

scored_controls.name: Logon Policies Baseline
scored_controls.description: Validates logon-related registry policies (controls 062-063, 199-200): local user enumeration, domain PIN logon, MPR, and automatic restart sign-on.
scored_controls.remediation: Set EnumerateLocalUsers=0, AllowDomainPINLogon=0, EnableMPR=0, DisableAutomaticRestartSignOn=1 under HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System.

scored_controls.name: Power Management Baseline
scored_controls.description: Validates sleep/wake password policies (controls 064-067): standby disabled and password required on wake for both battery and AC power.
scored_controls.remediation: Configure Power policy GUIDs via GPO or registry: abfc2519... DCSettingIndex=0, ACSettingIndex=0; 0e796bdb... DCSettingIndex=1, ACSettingIndex=1.

scored_controls.name: Remote Services Baseline
scored_controls.description: Validates remote service policies (controls 068-069): solicited Remote Assistance disabled and RPC restricted to authenticated clients.
scored_controls.remediation: Set fAllowToGetHelp=0 under Terminal Services policy key. Set RestrictRemoteClients=1 under Rpc policy key.

scored_controls.name: AutoPlay and Device Policies Baseline
scored_controls.description: Validates AutoPlay, AutoRun, biometrics anti-spoofing, BitLocker DMA protection, and removable drive write access policies (controls 073-079).
scored_controls.remediation: Configure via GPO: disable AutoPlay/AutoRun for all drives, enable Enhanced Anti-Spoofing, DisableExternalDMAUnderLock=1, UseEnhancedPin=1, RDVDenyWriteAccess=1.

scored_controls.name: Cloud Content and Privacy Baseline
scored_controls.description: Validates cloud content, privacy, and credential UI policies (controls 071-072, 080-081): voice activation above lock, MSA optional, consumer features, and admin enumeration.
scored_controls.remediation: Set LetAppsActivateWithVoiceAboveLock=2, MSAOptional=1, DisableWindowsConsumerFeatures=1, EnumerateAdministrators=0 via GPO or registry.

scored_controls.name: Event Log Size Baseline
scored_controls.description: Validates that the System event log maximum size is configured to at least 32768 KB (32 MB) per CIS benchmark (control 082).
scored_controls.remediation: Set HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\EventLog\System MaxSize to 32768 or greater via GPO (Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Event Log).

scored_controls.name: Security Options Baseline
scored_controls.description: Batch validation of ~28 security option registry values (controls 215-253): Lsa, Netlogon, LanmanWorkstation/Server, MSV1_0, LDAP, UAC, and session policies.
scored_controls.remediation: Apply CIS Level 1 GPO baseline. Key items: LmCompatibilityLevel=5, EnableLUA=1, NTLMMinClientSec/ServerSec=537395200, RestrictRemoteSAM configured, ConsentPromptBehaviorAdmin=2.

scored_controls.name: Password Policy Detailed
scored_controls.description: Validates password policy (controls 211-214) via net accounts and secedit: history >= 24, minimum length >= 14, complexity enabled, reversible encryption disabled.
scored_controls.remediation: Configure via GPO (Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Account Policies > Password Policy): History=24, MinLength=14, Complexity=Enabled, ReversibleEncryption=Disabled.

scored_controls.name: Account Lockout Policy Detailed
scored_controls.description: Validates account lockout policy (controls 207-210) via net accounts and registry: lockout duration >= 15 min, threshold <= $lockoutThresholdMax ($deviceType), observation window >= 15 min, AllowAdministratorLockout = 1.
scored_controls.remediation: Configure via GPO (Account Lockout Policy): Duration >= 15, Threshold <= 5 (servers) or <= 10 (workstations), Observation Window >= 15. Set AllowAdministratorLockout=1 in registry.

scored_controls.name: Audit Policy Configuration (Controls 278-301)
scored_controls.description: Validates 24 advanced audit policy subcategories per CIS benchmark.
scored_controls.remediation: Ensure the script runs with administrative privileges and auditpol is available.

scored_controls.name: Windows Firewall Profile Configuration (Controls 302-324)
scored_controls.description: Validates firewall settings across Domain, Private, and Public profiles.
scored_controls.remediation: Ensure the Windows Firewall service is running and the script has administrative privileges.

scored_controls.name: Test-BaselineIERestrictedZone
scored_controls.description: Checks 37 IE Restricted Sites zone (Zone 4) policy registry values (controls 106-142).
scored_controls.remediation: Apply CIS IE Benchmark GPO or manually set all listed DWORD values under HKLM:\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings\Zones\4 to their required values.

scored_controls.name: Test-BaselineIESecurity
scored_controls.description: Checks general IE security policy settings across multiple registry paths (controls 084-105, 143-150).
scored_controls.remediation: Apply CIS IE Benchmark GPO settings. Ensure TLS 1.1/1.2 are enabled (SecureProtocols=2688), Protected Mode and SmartScreen are active, and all phishing/certificate override policies are enforced.

scored_controls.name: Test-BaselineEdgeSecurity
scored_controls.description: Checks Microsoft Edge v139 security policy registry settings (controls 325-343).
scored_controls.remediation: Apply CIS Microsoft Edge Benchmark GPO. Ensure SmartScreen, site isolation, application-bound encryption, and extension blocklist policies are enforced via HKLM:\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Edge.

scored_controls.name: Test-BaselineDefenderPolicy
scored_controls.description: Checks Windows Defender GPO-level policy registry values including real-time protection, MAPS, cloud block, and PUA settings (controls 151-178).
scored_controls.remediation: Apply CIS Windows Defender Benchmark GPO. Ensure MAPS (SpynetReporting=2), cloud blocking (MpCloudBlockLevel=2), real-time monitoring, behavior monitoring, and script scanning are all active. Disable DisableRoutinelyTakingAction and DisableBlockAtFirstSeen.

scored_controls.name: RDP Security Configuration (Controls 183-188)
scored_controls.description: Validates RDP session security policies including encryption, password prompting, and drive redirection restrictions.
scored_controls.remediation: Apply via Group Policy: Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates > Windows Components > Remote Desktop Services. Set MinEncryptionLevel=3, enable fPromptForPassword, fEncryptRPCTraffic, DisablePasswordSaving, fDisableCdm. Disable AllowIndexingEncryptedStoresOrItems under Windows Search.

scored_controls.name: SmartScreen and Phishing Protection (Controls 189-194)
scored_controls.description: Validates Windows SmartScreen, phishing protection, and password reuse notifications are enabled and enforced.
scored_controls.remediation: Enable SmartScreen via Group Policy: Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates > Windows Components > Windows Defender SmartScreen. Set ShellSmartScreenLevel to Block. Enable all WTDS phishing notification settings under Windows Defender > Configure password protection.

scored_controls.name: Windows Miscellaneous Security Policies (Controls 195-198, 201-206)
scored_controls.description: Validates miscellaneous Windows component security policies including Game DVR, Windows Installer, PowerShell logging, and WinRM authentication settings.
scored_controls.remediation: Apply via Group Policy under Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates. Disable Game DVR, restrict Windows Installer elevation, enable Script Block Logging under PowerShell, and harden WinRM by disabling Basic auth, Digest auth, unencrypted traffic, and RunAs. Configure Windows Ink Workspace to disallow above lock screen.

scored_controls.name: Xbox Services Disabled (Controls 508-512)
scored_controls.description: Validates that Xbox-related services and scheduled tasks are disabled to reduce attack surface on non-gaming endpoints.
scored_controls.remediation: Disable Xbox services via Group Policy or PowerShell: Set-Service -Name XboxGipSvc,XblAuthManager,XblGameSave,XblNetworkingSvc -StartupType Disabled. Disable the XblGameSaveTask scheduled task: Disable-ScheduledTask -TaskName XblGameSaveTask.

scored_controls.name: $proto
scored_controls.description: $proto

scored_controls.name: $item.Name
scored_controls.description: $item.Name

scored_controls.name: EnableTranscripting
scored_controls.description: EnableTranscripting

scored_controls.name: WDigest UseLogonCredential
scored_controls.description: WDigest UseLogonCredential

scored_controls.name: EnableAutoDoh
scored_controls.description: EnableAutoDoh

scored_controls.name: NoAutoUpdate
scored_controls.description: NoAutoUpdate

scored_controls.name: AppIDSvc Start=Automatic
scored_controls.description: AppIDSvc Start=Automatic

scored_controls.name: NoDriveTypeAutoRun
scored_controls.description: NoDriveTypeAutoRun

scored_controls.name: M365 Office IE Security Feature Controls
scored_controls.description: Verifies that Internet Explorer feature controls are configured for Office applications under HKLM to reduce attack surface from malicious documents
scored_controls.remediation: Deploy the CIS Microsoft Office 365 benchmark GPO. Enable FEATURE_* registry keys under HKLM:\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\Main\FeatureControl for excel.exe, winword.exe, and powerpnt.exe. Set Flash CompatibilityFlags to 1024 and enable FEATURE_RESTRICT_LEGACY_JSCRIPT_PER_SECURITY_ZONE.

scored_controls.name: User Rights Assignments (Detailed)
scored_controls.description: Validates 16 critical user privilege assignments against CIS Benchmark Level 1 expected values using secedit export
scored_controls.remediation: Use Group Policy (Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Local Policies > User Rights Assignment) to remove unexpected principals from sensitive privileges. Privileges such as SeTcbPrivilege and SeCreateTokenPrivilege should have no assignees. Backup and Restore rights should be restricted to Administrators only.

scored_controls.name: M365 Office User Security Policies
scored_controls.description: Validates Office 16.0 macro security, trust center, protected view, file block, and Outlook security settings across all user profiles via HKCU (HKU PSDrive)
scored_controls.remediation: Deploy the CIS Microsoft Office 365 GPO baselines via Group Policy or Intune. Enable VBA macro notification level 3, block macros from internet, require trusted publisher for add-ins, disable trusted locations on network, and configure Outlook object model prompt to Automatically Deny.

scored_controls.name: User-Level Windows Policies
scored_controls.description: Validates per-user Windows policy settings: toast notification suppression, third-party content suggestions, and IE password form suggestion - evaluated across all user profiles via HKU
scored_controls.remediation: Deploy via Group Policy User Configuration or Intune: disable NoToastApplicationNotification, DisableThirdPartySuggestions, and set FormSuggest Passwords to "no" under the appropriate user registry paths.

baseline_atomic_checks.label: Require password on wake plugged in (AC)
AutoRun disabled for all drive types (255)
Voice activation above lock screen force-denied
Microsoft Account optional for store apps
Elevation prompt does not enumerate administrators
